evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long produced $640.5 on only 2 VALID_0DTE trades with $290/hour, but also the global -655.2 MAE and a 120-minute recovery path. Static broad filters would remove too much protected pullback/charm/squeeze edge.
name: Call-Wall Acceptance Persistence And Realization Box
risk: The worst tail is also the largest winner, so stronger acceptance and smaller targets may suppress net profit more than they improve hidden MAE.
trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance with positive forward DEX but wide selected target distance and extended ES-VWAP state.
validation_metric: Global worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4 or average MAE/exposure improves, call-wall PnL retention >=70%, total net profit >=98% of run_044, completed trades drop <=10%, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: The worst call-wall trade had early favorable movement but did not reach full TP until after deep adverse excursion; config cannot directly observe early path failure.
name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a two-trade profile and cut rare convex winners unless protected winner retention is validated.
trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long enters with wide target or extended ES-VWAP and fails to make sustained early progress before adverse expansion.
validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below the current -655.2 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, and no new slow trades.
